subject: DevOps
title: Secret Rotation
description: Learn Secret Rotation in one minute.

hook.text: The API key hadn't been rotated in three years. When it leaked, the attacker had years of access.

buildup.text: Rotation replaces secrets on a schedule. Old ones stop working. Leaked old secrets become useless.

discovery.text: Automated rotation is essential. Manual rotation gets skipped. Automate it in Vault or your cloud.

twist.text: Zero-downtime rotation overlaps validity. The old key works briefly while services grab the new one.

climax.text: AWS Secrets Manager rotates RDS credentials on a schedule. No human touch, no forgotten rotations.

punchline.text: Rotate secrets often and automatically. Short-lived keys limit damage.

quiz.question: Why is automated secret rotation important?
options: Manual rotation is error-prone and often skipped, leaving old secrets active
Rotated secrets use less storage space
